inpatient_hospitalization.limit_text: Sum Insured as specified in the Policy Schedule
inpatient_hospitalization.notes: Hospitalization must be for a minimum period of 24 consecutive hours.

day_care_treatments.limit_text: Sum Insured as specified in the Policy Schedule
day_care_treatments.notes: Treatment must not exceed 24 consecutive hours.

domiciliary_treatment.limit_text: Amount specified against this Benefit in the Policy Schedule
domiciliary_treatment.notes: Domiciliary Hospitalization must continue for a period exceeding 3 consecutive days.

ayush_coverage.limit_text: Sum Insured as specified in the Policy Schedule
ayush_coverage.notes: Treatment must be rendered from a registered Medical Practitioner.

maternity_coverage.limit_text: Amount specified against this Benefit in the Policy Schedule
maternity_coverage.notes: Waiting period of 36 months from the date of first inception of the policy.

newborn_coverage.limit_text: Baby born during the Policy Period and is aged up to 90 days

organ_donor_expenses.limit_text: Limit specified against this Benefit in the Policy Schedule
organ_donor_expenses.notes: Organ donor must be an eligible donor in accordance with The Transplantation of Human Organs Act, 1994.

ambulance_cover.limit_text: Amount specified against this Benefit in the Policy Schedule
ambulance_cover.notes: Ambulance transportation must be offered by a Hospital or by an Ambulance service provider.

restoration_benefit.notes: Recharge shall be utilized only after the base Sum Insured, 'No Claims Bonus' and 'Additional Sum Insured for Accidental Hospitalization' has been completely exhausted.

room_rent_capping: 1% of SI per day or Single Private AC Room
icu_capping: 2% of SI per day or no limit
copayment_trigger_notes: Applicable if Age of Insured Person or eldest Insured Person (in case of Floater) is 61 Years or above.
